MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. DBA POSTMATES, INC.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is Off calendar. By order dated October 6, 2021, the Court granted the parties' unopposed joint motion to submit the action to arbitration and dismissed the case without prejudice.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Joint Motion To Submit To Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-06-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. DBA POSTMATES, INC.'S Joint Motion To Submit To Arbitration:
Grant. Stipulated motion.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
